question: What is OpenAI's product and model strategy?
must_cover: Consolidation of the model ecosystem into a unified system (GPT-5)
Integration of reasoning (o3) into core models
Removal of the 'model picker' to simplify user experience
Bundling multimodal capabilities (voice, image, search, Deep Research)
Expansion into dedicated AI hardware with Jony Ive
must_not_claim: Confirmed DevDay 2025 launches (Sora 2, AgentKit, Apps SDK) as established facts
Stargate Project infrastructure details as covered by the evidence
notes: Derived from docs/早期OPENAI报告.md. This report was partial; source bundle was truncated, so over-claiming roadmap specifics is a trap.
